title: cydonia vulgaris f. pyriformis
intro: Cydonia vulgaris f. pyriformis, also known as the quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Cydonia vulgaris f. pyriformis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of diarrhea, nausea, and dyspepsia, as well as its use in traditional medicine to support skin health. Quince is often used in herbal preparations, such as jams, jellies, and teas, and its extracts are also used in pharmaceutical formulations due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties.
